questions.question: Describe the primary causes of the severe air pollution episode in New Delhi in 2017. (5 marks)
questions.hint: Identify the key factors contributing to the pollution episode

questions.question: Compare and contrast the air pollution levels in two major cities in India, Delhi and Mumbai, during the winter season. (5 marks)
questions.hint: Analyze the factors affecting air pollution levels in both cities

questions.question: What are the short-term and long-term effects of air pollution on human health, as observed in the case study of a nearby industrial area? (5 marks)
questions.hint: Summarize the health impacts of air pollution as discussed in the case study
